data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of sequential modes, but the evidence does not confirm that the system supports this functionality. While the linked use case describes a scenario where a session starts virtually and continues in-person, it does not provide concrete evidence that the system allows for this sequential transition as a requirement. The lack of explicit confirmation regarding the sequential mode functionality constitutes a gap in the evidence.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the system allows for sequential modes (virtual then in-person) as required.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the sequential mode functionality.
